---
title: "Track A (multi-ROI): LME within-person coupling (cwc/pm)"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Purpose
Estimate within-person coupling between outcome **Y** and ROI values across multiple ROIs/features using within-between decomposition:

- `ROI_pm`: participant mean across waves (between-person component)
- `ROI_cwc`: deviation from participant mean (within-person component)

Models are fit per ROI:
1) Base: `Y ~ time + group + Age0 + (1|ID)`
2) Coupling: add `ROI_cwc + ROI_pm`
3) Moderation: `ROI_cwc * group` (+ `ROI_pm`)

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(here)

source(here::here("R", "lme_cwc_pm_multi.R"))

in_dir  <- here::here("outputs", "trackA_multiROI")
out_dir <- in_dir

dat_roi_long <- readRDS(file.path(in_dir, "dat_roi_long_qc_ageTimeline.rds"))

res <- fit_cwc_pm_models_multiROI(
  dat = dat_roi_long,
  outcome = "Y",
  id = "ID",
  time = "time_point",
  age0 = "Age0",
  group = "Sex",
  roi_value = "ROI_value",
  roi_name = "ROI_name"
)

write_csv(res$fixed_effects, file.path(out_dir, "trackA_lme_cwcpm_fixed_effects.csv"))
write_csv(res$model_tests,   file.path(out_dir, "trackA_lme_cwcpm_model_tests.csv"))
write_csv(res$key_terms,     file.path(out_dir, "trackA_lme_cwcpm_key_terms.csv"))

res$key_terms
```
